displayName: Gemini live (Talk to Gemini with natural premium voices.)
description:
Real-time voice conversations with Google Gemini AI directly in NVDA.
Speak naturally and hear spoken responses using 30+ ultra-realistic voices.
Supports live audio streaming, text input fallback, multiple API keys with automatic rotation, system instructions, adjustable creativity (temperature), Google Search grounding, and secure code execution.
Start conversations instantly with NVDA+S or configure detailed settings via NVDA+Alt+G.
Perfect for hands-free assistance, research, coding help, and natural AI interaction.
Made and maintained in: Nepal.
Author: Sujan Rai.
